purpose: Minimal in-scope governance-topology evidence note used to exercise Tier-3 Standing Authority derivation (SA-claude/2062-sa-issuance-27502201460) without a per-PR GMA. Additive only; changes no required-check configuration and no execution semantics.
derivation_expectation: claude/* branch + governance_mutation confined to governance/topology/** derives authorization at merge-governance-check Tier 3; merge-proof stamps standing_authority_id and consumes one budget unit (1/3).
